style_prefix: Photographed handmade paper craft collage made by primary-school children on a messy wooden school desk. Layered scraps of construction paper, newspaper with only blurry illegible texture (no readable headlines), magazine gloss bits, shiny gift-wrap foil, kraft paper. Mix of imperfect scissors-cut jagged edges and hand-torn fibrous white edges. Crooked masking tape, glue stains, slightly crooked layers. Soft classroom daylight, paper grain, soft contact shadow under the craft. Photoreal craft object. Not digital flat illustration, not CGI, not plastic toys, not neon candy, not clean Instagram scrapbook, not laser-cut perfect edges.

alphabet_prompt: Single cut-out paper character '{char}' made from construction paper or newsprint collage, hand-cut or torn edges, centered, bold readable glyph for a kids game HUD, transparent background, no other objects.
